default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the Q1 content strategy for Superhuman Mail.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** The new content strategy is approved, focusing exclusively on Superhuman Mail to build brand awareness and authority.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**New Cluster Structure:** The content taxonomy will be simplified from 12 to 5 clusters, consolidating overlapping topics for clearer performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility Push:** Content will target "zero visibility" topics in AI answers (e.g., Enterprise, ROI) to increase brand presence in search summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [**Sales Content Deprioritized:** The "Sales & Revenue Productivity" cluster is now low-to-mid priority due to low product-market fit (PMF) and conversion issues.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Review

  - [**December Production:** 40 articles will be published by EOY to build SEO traction for the new year.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
      - [**Source:** Content audit-identified refreshes and new competitor pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Competitor Content Review:** Superhuman will retroactively review competitor comparison posts (e.g., Fixer, Big Surverses) to provide product feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensure accuracy and effective positioning against key threats.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
      - [**Process:** Jo will send Google Docs for in-doc collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

### New Content Strategy: Superhuman Mail Focus

  - [**Primary Goal:** Drive organic clicks and build topical authority for Superhuman Mail.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Address the primary challenge of low brand awareness for the new product.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**Product Focus:** Exclusively Superhuman Mail. Grammarly and Coda will only be mentioned contextually, not as primary topics.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**Bundle Strategy:** Deprioritized for now. The bundle's disjointed brands require internal alignment (Q1) before a content strategy can be developed.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### Strategy Pillar 1: LLM Visibility

  - [**Opportunity:** Superhuman's brand presence in AI answers is 26–31% across \~15k tracked answers.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [**Tactic:** Create net-new content for "zero visibility" prompt categories to directly influence AI summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [**Initial Targets:** Enterprise team adoption, cost & ROI justification.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [**Context:** Superhuman's own data shows AI referral traffic (from ChatGPT, Perplexity) has dropped from \~200 visits/day to near zero post-rebrand.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### Strategy Pillar 2: New Topic Cluster Structure

  - [**Rationale:** The previous 12 clusters were overlapping and diluted performance tracking. The new 5-cluster structure provides a clearer view of wins and losses.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [**The 5 Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
    1.  [**Email Productivity & AI Management:** Core product-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
    2.  [**AI Workflows & Automation:** Targets knowledge workers; covers AI adoption and productivity stacks.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
    3.  **Listicles & Commercial Keywords:** Software comparisons and reviews.
          - [**Action:** Add Fixer to the list of competitors to track.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
    4.  **Team Collaboration & Sales & Revenue Productivity:**
          - [**Sales Content:** Deprioritized (low-to-mid priority) due to low PMF and poor conversion of top-of-funnel leads to deals.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
          - [**Action:** GrowthX will research query volume for other high-adoption teams (e.g., leadership, operations) to find a replacement focus.](https://fathom.video/share/uJEchXn3jbJa7zen-fa-zY8ATGswvwqd?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
